member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.Patching.LoadingActions.ModLoadingAction
member.summary: A general loading action for a SpaceWarp mod plugin.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.Patching.LoadingActions.ModLoadingAction.#ctor(System.String,System.Action{SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.ISpaceWarpMod},SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.ISpaceWarpMod)
member.summary: Creates a new mod plugin loading action.
member.param: Callback to perform the loading action.
The mod plugin to create the action for.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.Patching.LoadingActions.ModLoadingAction.DoAction(System.Action,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Performs the loading action.
member.param: Callback to call when the action is resolved.
Callback to call when the action is rejected.

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.Patching.LoadingActions.DescriptorLoadingAction
member.summary: A general loading action for a mod descriptor.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.Patching.LoadingActions.DescriptorLoadingAction.#ctor(System.String,System.Action{SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpPluginDescriptor},SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpPluginDescriptor)
member.summary: Creates a new descriptor loading action.
member.param: Callback to perform the loading action.
The plugin descriptor to create the action for.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.Patching.LoadingActions.DescriptorLoadingAction.DoAction(System.Action,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Performs the loading action.
member.param: Callback to call when the action is resolved.
Callback to call when the action is rejected.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.InternalUtilities.PathHelpers.GetRelativePath(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a relative path from one file or folder to another.
member.param: Contains the directory that defines the start of the relative path.
Contains the path that defines the endpoint of the relative path.
member.returns: The relative path from the start directory to the end path.

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.GlobalModDefines
member.summary: Global definitions for all SpaceWarp mods.

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.GlobalModDefines.AssetBundlesFolder
member.summary: Relative path to the folder containing the mod's asset bundles.

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.GlobalModDefines.ImageAssetsFolder
member.summary: Relative path to the folder containing the mod's images.

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.DependencyInfo
member.summary: Represents the json property info. Properties have to use the same name as in the JSON file, that's why they break convention.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.DependencyInfo.ID
member.summary: The ID of the dependency.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.DependencyInfo.Version
member.summary: The version of the dependency.

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.ModInfo
member.summary: Representation of the mod info JSON file.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.ModInfo.Spec
member.summary: The spec version of the mod info file.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.ModInfo.ModID
member.summary: The mod ID of the mod.
member.exception: Thrown when the spec version is 1.2.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.ModInfo.Name
member.summary: The name of the mod.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.ModInfo.Author
member.summary: The author of the mod.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.ModInfo.Description
member.summary: The description of the mod.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.ModInfo.Source
member.summary: The URL of the source code of the mod.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.ModInfo.Version
member.summary: The version of the mod.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.ModInfo.Dependencies
member.summary: The dependencies of the mod.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.ModInfo.SupportedKsp2Versions
member.summary: The KSP2 versions supported by the mod.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.ModInfo.VersionCheck
member.summary: The URL for the version checking of the mod.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.ModInfo.Conflicts
member.summary: The conflicts of the mod.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.ModInfo.Patchers
member.summary: The filenames of patcher assemblies of the mod.

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SupportedVersionsInfo
member.summary: Representation of the supported version info of a mod from a JSON file.

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SupportedVersionsInfo.DefaultMin
member.summary: The default minimum version.

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SupportedVersionsInfo.DefaultMax
member.summary: The default maximum version.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SupportedVersionsInfo.Min
member.summary: The minimum supported version of KSP2.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SupportedVersionsInfo.Max
member.summary: The maximum supported version of KSP2.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SupportedVersionsInfo.IsSupported(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the given version is supported by this mod.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SupportedVersionsInfo.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string representation of the version range.
member.returns: The string representation of the version range.

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion
member.summary: Represents the version of the API specification from the swinfo.json file.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion.Major
member.summary: Major version number.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion.Minor
member.summary: Minor version number.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion.Default
member.summary: Specification version 1.0 (SpaceWarp < 1.2.0) - used if "spec" is not specified in the swinfo.json file.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion.V1_2
member.summary: Specification version 1.2 (SpaceWarp 1.2.0 - 1.2.1) - replaces SpaceWarp's proprietary ModID with BepInEx plugin GUID.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion.V1_3
member.summary: Specification version 1.3 (SpaceWarp 1.3.0 - 1.4.3) - adds back the ModID field, but enforces that it is the same as the BepInEx plugin GUID if there is a BepInEx plugin attached to the swinfo, since w/ version 1.3 there does not have to be a plugin. Also enforces that all dependencies use BepInEx GUID, and that they are loaded.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion.V2_0
member.summary: Specification version 2.0 (SpaceWarp 1.5.0 - 1.7.0) - removes support for version checking from .csproj files, adds support for specifying mod conflicts. Switched to semantic versioning.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion.V2_1
member.summary: Specification version 2.1 (SpaceWarp 1.8.0 - 1.9.5) - requires that mods specify their preload patchers in the swinfo.json file.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion.V3_0
member.summary: Specification version 3.0 (SpaceWarp 2.0.0 - *) - requires mods to specify their entrypoint DLL in "main_assembly".

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new SpecVersion object with the version "major.minor".

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new SpecVersion object from a string.
member.exception: Thrown if the string format is invalid

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion.ToString
member.summary: Returns the string representation of the version in the format "major.minor".

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion.op_LessThan(SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion,SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion)
member.summary: Returns true if the first version is less than the second version.
member.returns: True if the first version is less than the second version

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion.op_GreaterThan(SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion,SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion)
member.summary: Returns true if the first version is greater than the second version.
member.returns: True if the first version is greater than the second version

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion.op_LessThanOrEqual(SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion,SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion)
member.summary: Returns true if the first version is less than or equal to the second version.
member.returns: True if the first version is less than or equal to the second version

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion.op_GreaterThanOrEqual(SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion,SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion)
member.summary: Returns true if the first version is greater than or equal to the second version.
member.returns: True if the first version is greater than or equal to the second version

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.InvalidSpecVersionException
member.summary: Thrown if the specification version string is invalid.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.InvalidSpecVersionException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new InvalidSpecVersionException.

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.DeprecatedSwinfoPropertyException
member.summary: Thrown if a property is deprecated in the current specification version.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.DeprecatedSwinfoPropertyException.#ctor(System.String,SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.JSON.SpecVersion)
member.summary: Creates a new DeprecatedSwinfoPropertyException.
member.param: Specification version in which the property was deprecated

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.ISpaceWarpMod
member.summary: Interface for all SpaceWarp mods

summary.para: 1st stage initialization.
This is called before any of the game is actually loaded, it is called as early as possible in the game's bootstrap process.
2nd stage initialization.
This is called after the game is loaded, and after your mods assets are loaded.
3rd stage initialization.
This is called after all mods have done 2nd stage initialization.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.ISpaceWarpMod.SWLogger
member.summary: Gets the logger for this mod

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.ISpaceWarpMod.SWConfiguration
member.summary: Gets the configuration file for this mod

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.ISpaceWarpMod.SWMetadata
member.summary: Gets the metadata for this mod

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.PluginList
member.summary: API for accessing information about currently loaded and disabled plugins.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.PluginList.ModListChangedSinceLastRun
member.summary: Set if the plugin list is different in any way since last run (version differences, new mods, mods removed, mods disabled, description differences, any different in any swinfo file and the disabled mod list).

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.PluginList.TryGetSwinfo(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the of the specified plugin. Returns null if the specified plugin guid doesn't have an associated .
member.returns: of the plugin or null if not found

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.PluginList.TryGetDescriptor(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the of the specified plugin. Returns null if the specified plugin guid doesn't have an associated .
member.returns: of the plugin or null if not found

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.PluginList.TryGetPlugin``1
member.summary: Retrieves the instance of the specified plugin class.
member.typeparam: The type of the plugin class
member.returns: Plugin instance or null if not found

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.PluginList.TryGetPlugin``1(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the instance of a plugin class with the given GUID.
member.typeparam: The type of the plugin class
member.returns: Plugin instance or null if not found

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.PluginList.AllEnabledAndActivePlugins
member.summary: All plugins that are enabled and active (not errored)

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.PluginList.AllDisabledPlugins
member.summary: All disabled plugins

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.PluginList.AllErroredPlugins
member.summary: All errored plugins

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.PluginList.AllPlugins
member.summary: All plugins, including disabled and errored

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.PluginList.ResolveDependenciesAndLoadOrder
member.summary: This is done after Awake/LoadModule(), so that everything else can use it

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpErrorDescription
member.summary: This class is used to describe the errors that occur when loading a plugin

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpErrorDescription.Plugin
member.summary: The plugin that errored

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpErrorDescription.MissingSwinfo
member.summary: Whether the plugin is missing a swinfo file

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpErrorDescription.BadDirectory
member.summary: Whether the plugin is in the wrong directory

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpErrorDescription.BadID
member.summary: Whether the plugin has a bad ID

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpErrorDescription.MismatchedVersion
member.summary: Whether there's a version mismatch between the swinfo and the plugin

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpErrorDescription.DisabledDependencies
member.summary: List of dependencies that are disabled

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpErrorDescription.ErroredDependencies
member.summary: List of dependencies that errored

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpErrorDescription.MissingDependencies
member.summary: List of dependencies that are missing

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpErrorDescription.UnsupportedDependencies
member.summary: List of dependencies that are unsupported

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpErrorDescription.UnspecifiedDependencies
member.summary: List of dependencies that are unspecified

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpErrorDescription.Incompatibilities
member.summary: List of incompatibilities

member.summary: Creates a new error description for a plugin

member.summary: A descriptor for a SpaceWarp plugin.

member.summary: Creates a new plugin descriptor.

member.summary: The plugin instance.

member.summary: The plugin's GUID.

member.summary: The plugin's name.

member.summary: The plugin's swinfo.

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpPluginDescriptor.Folder
member.summary: The plugin's folder.

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpPluginDescriptor.DoLoadingActions
member.summary: Whether or not to do loading actions.

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpPluginDescriptor.ConfigFile
member.summary: The plugin's config file.

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpPluginDescriptor.Outdated
member.summary: Whether or not the plugin is outdated. Set by the version checking system.

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpPluginDescriptor.Unsupported
member.summary: Whether or not the plugin is unsupported.

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpPluginDescriptor.LatePreInitialize
member.summary: Whether or not the plugin has been pre-initialized yet.

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpPluginDescriptor.IsCore
member.summary: Is this a core mod (as in which part of the mod list does it go into)

member.summary: This class allows you to register your custom PartComponentModule for background resource processing.

member.typeparam: Your Custom Module class that inherits from PartComponentModule

member.summary: Unregisters your custom module from background resource processing.
member.typeparam: Your Custom Module class that inherits from PartComponentModule

member.summary: The delegate type that will be called when a save or load event is triggered.

member.summary: This class is used to store your mod data for saving and loading.

member.summary: The GUID of your mod

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Backend.SaveGameManager.PluginSaveData.SaveData
member.summary: The data that will be saved

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.VersionUtility
member.summary: Utility class for comparing semantic versions

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.VersionUtility.IsNewerThan(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if one semantic version is newer than another
member.returns: version1 is newer than version2

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.VersionUtility.IsOlderThan(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if one semantic version is older than another
member.returns: version1 is older than version2

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.VersionUtility.IsSupported(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a semantic version is supported by a range of versions

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.VersionUtility.CompareSemanticVersionStrings(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Compares 2 semantic versions
member.returns: 0 if version1 equals version2, -1 if version1 is less than version2, 1 if version1 is greater than version2

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion
member.summary: Extended version of semantic versioning (see https://semver.org/) that supports an unlimited amount of version numbers.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.Major
member.summary: The major (first) version number.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.Minor
member.summary: The minor (second) version number.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.Patch
member.summary: The patch (third) version number.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.VersionNumbers
member.summary: List of all version numbers.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.Prerelease
member.summary: Prerelease identifiers.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.Build
member.summary: Build metadata.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new SemanticVersion object.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new SemanticVersion object.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new SemanticVersion object.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new SemanticVersion object from a version string.
member.exception: Thrown if the version string is invalid

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.CompareTo(SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion)
member.summary: Compares this version to another version.
member.param: The other version to compare to.
member.returns: Negative if this version is less than the other version, 0 if they are equal, positive if this version is larger than the other version.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.op_LessThan(SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion,SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion)
member.summary: Compares whether one version is less than another version.
member.returns: True if a is less than b, false otherwise.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.op_GreaterThan(SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion,SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion)
member.summary: Compares whether one version is greater than another version.
member.returns: True if a is greater than b, false otherwise.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.op_LessThanOrEqual(SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion,SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion)
member.summary: Compares whether one version is less than or equal to another version.
member.returns: True if a is less than or equal to b, false otherwise.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.op_GreaterThanOrEqual(SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion,SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion)
member.summary: Compares whether one version is greater than or equal to another version.
member.returns: True if a is greater than or equal to b, false otherwise.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.op_Equality(SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion,SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion)
member.summary: Compares whether one version is equal to another version.
member.returns: True if a is equal to b, false otherwise.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.op_Inequality(SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion,SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion)
member.summary: Compares whether one version is not equal to another version.
member.returns: True if a is not equal to b, false otherwise.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.ToString
member.summary: Returns the version as a string.
member.returns: Version string.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.op_Implicit(SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion)~System.String
member.summary: Implicitly converts a SemanticVersion object to a string.
member.returns: Version string.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion.op_Explicit(System.String)~SpaceWarp2.API.Versions.SemanticVersion
member.summary: Explicitly converts a string to a SemanticVersion object.
member.returns: SemanticVersion object.

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.API.Loading.LoadingActions.AddressableAction`1
member.summary: A loading action that loads addressable assets by label.
member.typeparam: The type of assets to load.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Loading.LoadingActions.AddressableAction`1.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Action{`0})
member.summary: Creates a new addressable loading action.
member.param: Label of the asset to load.
Action to perform on the loaded asset.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Loading.LoadingActions.AddressableAction`1.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Action{`0})
member.summary: Creates a new addressable loading action, with the option to keep the asset in memory after loading. This is useful for textures or UXML templates, for example.
member.param: Label of the asset to load.
Action to perform on the loaded asset.
Allows to keep asset in memory after loading them.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Loading.LoadingActions.AddressableAction`1.DoAction(System.Action,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Performs the loading action.
member.param: Callback to call when the action is resolved.
Callback to call when the action is rejected.

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.API.Loading.SaveLoad
member.summary: An API to register flow actions to be run during loading and saving.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Loading.SaveLoad.AddFlowActionToGameLoadAfter(ReduxLib.GameInterfaces.IFlowAction,System.String)

summary.para: Add a FlowAction to the Game's load sequence.
The action will be run after the first FlowAction with a name equal to referenceAction. If referenceAction is null, the action will be the first action run.

The FlowActions that occur in this sequence by default are: (Updated for KSP 0.1.1.0)
"Creating Splash Screens Prefab"
"Set Loading Optimizations"
"Initialize Addressables system"
"Creating Game Instance"
"Initializing Game Instance"
"Creating Graphics Manager"
"Creating Main Menu"
"Load UI Background Scenes"
"Parsing Loading Screens"
"Set Loading Optimizations"
"loading addressable localizations" (Added by SpaceWarp)

member.param: The name of the action to insert a TFlowActionType after. Use null to insert it at the start.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Loading.SaveLoad.AddFlowActionToCampaignLoadAfter``1(System.String)

summary.para: Add a FlowAction to the save file loading sequence. A new TFlowActionType is constructed every load.

TFlowActionType must have a public constructor that at most one of each of the following types:
SaveLoadManager
LoadOrSaveCampaignTicket
LoadGameData
The action will be run after the first FlowAction with a name equal to referenceAction. If referenceAction is null, the action will be the first action run.

The FlowActions that occur in this sequence by default are: (Updated for KSP 0.1.1.0)
"Deserializing Save File Contents"
"Starting..."
"Loading session manager data"
"Set Loading Optimizations"
"Setup local player"
"Load Session Guid"
"Loading KSP2 mission base"
"Load Campaign Players"
"Load Agencies"
"Load Fixup Player And Agency"
"Setup OAB Part Seed Counter"
"Unload Main Menu"
"Validating Version Number"
"Initializing Session Data"
"Load required assets"
"Parsing resource assets"
"Freezing resource definition database"
"Parsing procedural part assets"
"Freezing procedural part definition database"
"Loading Kerbal Prefab Data"
"Loading Kerbal Roster Data"
"Loading Colony Data"
"Setup Properties"
"Creating Simulation"
"Loading Celestial Body Data"
"Parsing interstellar universe"
"Parsing parts text assets"
"Creating Celestial Bodies"
"Pumping Sim Once"
"Creating Universe"
"Creating ViewController"
"Pumping Sim Once"
"Spawning initial local-space body..."
"Loading Map Systems"
"Loading UI Manager"
"Loading KSP2 missions"
"Setting Universe State"
"Creating Vessel"
"Set Active Vessel for Local Player"
"Loading Travel Log Data"
"Pumping Sim Once"
"Loading dashboard for the user"
"Setting Camera State"
"Starting Sim"
"Pumping Sim Once"
"Applying flight control state"
"Applying legacy module data to vessel parts"
"Load Planted Flags"
"Wait for async handles"
"Load Done"
"Set Loading Optimizations"
"Ending..."

member.typeparam: The type of FlowAction to insert
member.param: The name of the action to insert a TFlowActionType after. Use null to insert it at the start.
member.exception: Thrown if TFlowActionType does not have a valid Constructor

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Loading.SaveLoad.AddFlowActionToCampaignLoadAfter(ReduxLib.GameInterfaces.IFlowAction,System.String)

summary.para: Add a FlowAction to the save file loading sequence. The same object is used for every load.
The action will be run after the first FlowAction with a name equal to referenceAction. If referenceAction is null, the action will be the first action run.

The FlowActions that occur in this sequence by default are: (Updated for KSP 0.1.1.0)
"Deserializing Save File Contents"
"Starting..."
"Loading session manager data"
"Set Loading Optimizations"
"Setup local player"
"Load Session Guid"
"Loading KSP2 mission base"
"Load Campaign Players"
"Load Agencies"
"Load Fixup Player And Agency"
"Setup OAB Part Seed Counter"
"Unload Main Menu"
"Validating Version Number"
"Initializing Session Data"
"Load required assets"
"Parsing resource assets"
"Freezing resource definition database"
"Parsing procedural part assets"
"Freezing procedural part definition database"
"Loading Kerbal Prefab Data"
"Loading Kerbal Roster Data"
"Loading Colony Data"
"Setup Properties"
"Creating Simulation"
"Loading Celestial Body Data"
"Parsing interstellar universe"
"Parsing parts text assets"
"Creating Celestial Bodies"
"Pumping Sim Once"
"Creating Universe"
"Creating ViewController"
"Pumping Sim Once"
"Spawning initial local-space body..."
"Loading Map Systems"
"Loading UI Manager"
"Loading KSP2 missions"
"Setting Universe State"
"Creating Vessel"
"Set Active Vessel for Local Player"
"Loading Travel Log Data"
"Pumping Sim Once"
"Loading dashboard for the user"
"Setting Camera State"
"Starting Sim"
"Pumping Sim Once"
"Applying flight control state"
"Applying legacy module data to vessel parts"
"Load Planted Flags"
"Wait for async handles"
"Load Done"
"Set Loading Optimizations"
"Ending..."

member.param: The name of the action to insert a FlowActionType after. Use null to insert it at the start.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Loading.SaveLoad.AddFlowActionToCampaignSaveAfter``1(System.String)

summary.para: Add a FlowAction to the save file writing sequence. A new TFlowActionType is constructed every load.

TFlowActionType must have a public constructor that at most one of each of the following types:
SaveLoadManager
LoadOrSaveCampaignTicket
The action will be run after the first FlowAction with a name equal to referenceAction. If referenceAction is null, the action will be the first action run.

The FlowActions that occur in this sequence by default are: (Updated for KSP 0.1.1.0)
"Collecting vessel data for serialization"
"Saving session manager"
"Setting version"
"Saving session guid"
"Collecting game session metadata"
"Saving Kerbal roster"
"Saving colony data"
"Saving Travel Log"
"Collecting mission data for serialization"
"Collecting OAB workspace data for serialization"
"Saving planted flags"
"Saving agencies"
"Saving campaign players"
"Serializing Save File Contents"

member.typeparam: The type of FlowAction to insert
member.param: The name of the action to insert a TFlowActionType after. Use null to insert it at the start.
member.exception: Thrown if TFlowActionType does not have a valid Constructor

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Loading.SaveLoad.AddFlowActionToCampaignSaveAfter(ReduxLib.GameInterfaces.IFlowAction,System.String)

summary.para: Add a FlowAction to the save file writing sequence. The same object is used for every load.
The action will be run after the first FlowAction with a name equal to referenceAction. If referenceAction is null, the action will be the first action run.

The FlowActions that occur in this sequence by default are: (Updated for KSP 0.1.1.0)
"Collecting vessel data for serialization"
"Saving session manager"
"Setting version"
"Saving session guid"
"Collecting game session metadata"
"Saving Kerbal roster"
"Saving colony data"
"Saving Travel Log"
"Collecting mission data for serialization"
"Collecting OAB workspace data for serialization"
"Saving planted flags"
"Saving agencies"
"Saving campaign players"
"Serializing Save File Contents"

member.param: The name of the action to insert a FlowActionType after. Use null to insert it at the start.

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.API.Loading.Loading
member.summary: API for mods to register their actions for the loading of assets.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Loading.Loading.AddDescriptorLoadingAction(System.String,System.Action{SpaceWarp2.API.Mods.SpaceWarpPluginDescriptor})
member.summary: Registers a per mod loading action (but more general). Should be added either on Awake() or Start().

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Loading.Loading.AddGeneralLoadingAction(System.Func{ReduxLib.GameInterfaces.IFlowAction})
member.summary: Registers a general loading action. Should be added either on Awake() or Start().

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Loading.Loading.AddAddressablesLoadingAction``1(System.String,System.String,System.Action{``0})
member.summary: Registers an action to be done on addressables after addressables have been loaded. Should be added either on Awake() or Start().
member.param: The addressables label to hook into
The action to be done on each addressables asset
member.typeparam: The type of asset that this action is done upon

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.Loading.Loading.AddAddressablesLoadingAction``1(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Action{``0})
member.summary: Registers an action to be done on addressables after addressables have been loaded. Should be added either on Awake() or Start(). Allows to keep asset in memory after loading them. This is useful for textures or UXML templates, for example.
member.param: The addressables label to hook into
Indicates if assets should be kept in memory after loading them.
The action to be done on each addressables asset
member.typeparam: The type of asset that this action is done upon

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.API.CommonPaths
member.summary: Contains paths to various directories.

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.API.SaveGameManager.ModSaves
member.summary: This class allows you to register your mod data for the game's save file system .

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.SaveGameManager.ModSaves.PluginSaveData
member.summary: Per-save plugin data

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.API.SaveGameManager.ModSaves.PluginCampaignData
member.summary: Per-campaign plugin data

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.SaveGameManager.ModSaves.RegisterSaveLoadGameData``1(System.String,System.Action{``0},System.Action{``0},System.Func{``0,``0},``0,SpaceWarp2.API.Backend.SaveGameManager.PersistenceKind)
member.summary: Registers your mod data for saving and loading events.
member.param: Your mod GUID. Or, technically, any kind of string can be passed here, but what is mandatory is that it's unique compared to what other mods will use.
Function that will execute when a SAVE event is triggered. Defaults to null or no callback.
Function that will execute when a LOAD event is triggered. Defaults to null or no callback.
Function that will execute when a LOAD event happens where there was not data prior in the save or campaign for this mod. What is passed in is the old data, and what is returned becomes the new data.

Your object that will be saved to a save file during a save event and that will be updated when a load event pulls new data. Ensure that a new instance of this object is NOT created after registration.
How the save data is persisted, per save or per campaign, your mod can register save data in one of each of these slots
member.returns: T saveData object you passed as a parameter, or a default instance of object T if you didn't pass anything

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.SaveGameManager.ModSaves.UnRegisterSaveLoadGameData(System.String,SpaceWarp2.API.Backend.SaveGameManager.PersistenceKind)
member.summary: Unregister your previously registered mod data for saving and loading. Use this if you no longer need your data to be saved and loaded.
member.param: Your mod GUID you used when registering.
The type of persistence you used when registering.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.SaveGameManager.ModSaves.ReregisterSaveLoadGameData``1(System.String,System.Action{``0},System.Action{``0},System.Func{``0,``0},``0,SpaceWarp2.API.Backend.SaveGameManager.PersistenceKind)
member.summary: Unregisters then again registers your mod data for saving and loading events
member.typeparam: The type of your save data
member.param: Your mod GUID. Or, technically, any kind of string can be passed here, but what is mandatory is that it's unique compared to what other mods will use.
Function that will execute when a SAVE event is triggered. Defaults to null or no callback.
Function that will execute when a LOAD event is triggered. Defaults to null or no callback.

Function that will execute when a LOAD event is triggered where there was not data prior in the save or campaign for this mod. What is passed in is the old data, and what is returned becomes the new data.

Your object that will be saved to a save file during a save event and that will be updated when a load event pulls new data. Ensure that a new instance of this object is NOT created after registration.
How the save data is persisted, per save or per campaign, your mod can register save data in one of each of these slots
member.returns: T saveData object you passed as a parameter, or a default instance of object T if you didn't pass anything

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.API.SaveGameManager.ModSaves.TriggerCampaignSaveDataUpdate
member.summary: Manually trigger a campaign save data flush

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.API.ModList
member.summary: Contains methods related to the mod list.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.ModList.DisabledPluginGuids
member.summary: The list of all disabled plugin GUIDs.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.API.ModList.ChangedSinceLastRun
member.summary: Whether the mod list changed since the last run.

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.Modules.SpaceWarpModule
member.summary: Base class for SpaceWarp modules.

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.Modules.SpaceWarpModule.ModuleLogger
member.summary: The logger for the module.

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.Modules.SpaceWarpModule.ModuleConfiguration
member.summary: The configuration file for the module.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.Modules.SpaceWarpModule.Name
member.summary: The name of the module.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.Modules.SpaceWarpModule.LoadModule
member.summary: Loads the module. Called in plugin's Awake method.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.Modules.SpaceWarpModule.PreInitializeModule
member.summary: 1st stage of module initialization. Called in plugin's OnPreInitialized method.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.Modules.SpaceWarpModule.InitializeModule
member.summary: 2nd stage of module initialization. Called in plugin's OnInitialized method.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.Modules.SpaceWarpModule.PostInitializeModule
member.summary: 3rd stage of module initialization. Called in plugin's OnPostInitialized method.

member.name: P:SpaceWarp2.Modules.SpaceWarpModule.Prerequisites
member.summary: Names of modules that this module depends on.

member.name: T:SpaceWarp2.Modules.ModuleManager
member.summary: Manager of SpaceWarp modules.

member.name: M:SpaceWarp2.Modules.ModuleManager.TryGetModule(System.String,SpaceWarp2.Modules.SpaceWarpModule@)
member.summary: Gets a SpaceWarp module instance by name.
member.returns: True if the module was found, false otherwise.

member.name: F:SpaceWarp2.SpaceWarpPlugin.Instance
member.summary: SpaceWarp plugin instance.
